strengths: 19 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Recent immersion in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates awareness of emerging AI technologies
Proven technical leadership through founding GISCollective, mentoring at multiple organizations, and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or strategic AI expertise despite this being the core role focus
Resume shows strong technical depth in staff-level positions but no principal or director-level strategic decision-making evidence
Missing preferred qualifications (no Master's or PhD) and no record of advising enterprise customers or partners on technology adoption
response.justification: Szabo has substantial engineering breadth (19 years) and demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentoring. However, the principal engineer AI strategy role requires proven AI/ML product delivery, strategic customer advisory experience, and director-level decision-making—none evident in the resume. The recent MCP framework work is promising but unproven at scale. His background positions him as a strong senior full-stack engineer but falls short of principal-level AI strategy requirements.
